title: INTRO THEME SONG — Sara and Eva sing the show theme
purpose: Reusable across every episode. Generate ONCE, save to season_01/intro/intro_song.mp4, prepend at start of every episode.
prompt: FULL MUSICAL NUMBER. Bright stage-lit wide shot in @living-room — this is a kids'-show theme-song opener, music-dominant. STRONG upbeat instrumentation throughout: dynamic ukulele riff, snappy handclaps on every beat, bouncy walking bass line, jingling tambourine, sparkling glockenspiel, light brass stabs on accents. BPM 110, bright major key, Disney-Channel-opener energy. @Sara on the LEFT and @Eva on the RIGHT face the camera grinning ear-to-ear, holding hands, bouncing energetically in perfect rhythm to the music, swaying side-to-side with the beat. Both children singing together brightly in joyful unison, voices clear over the loud cheerful music, perfectly on the beat: "Sa-ra! E-va! Sa-ra and E-va! Best big sister, baby sister, hoo-RAY! Sa-ra and E-va — let's start the show to-DAY!" Glitter confetti rains down, stage-lights pulse rainbow-colors in time with the beat, the room glows with warm cheerful magic. Final note holds with both arms raised triumphantly.
